hero.badge: Start Date: April 26, 2026 · Ho Chi Minh City
hero.title: TechForward
hero.subtitle: Where visionaries, engineers, and founders converge to shape the next decade of technology.

about.title: A Summit Built for the Next Generation of Tech Leaders
about.description: TechForward Summit brings together the brightest minds in AI, product development, and startup ecosystems. Over one transformative day, you'll gain actionable insights, forge lasting connections, and leave inspired to build what's next.

items.title: Registration & Welcome Coffee
items.desc: Check in, get your badge, and network over breakfast.

items.title: Opening Keynote
items.desc: The State of Tech in Southeast Asia - trends that will define the next 5 years.

items.title: AI in Production: Beyond the Hype
items.desc: Real-world case studies from companies who shipped AI at scale.

items.title: Lunch & Expo
items.desc: Visit partner booths, demo products, and connect with sponsors.

items.title: Workshop: Build Your First LLM App
items.desc: Hands-on session - bring your laptop and ship something by 3 PM.

items.title: Fireside Chat: Scaling a Startup
items.desc: Founders share unfiltered lessons from 0 to Series B.

items.title: Closing & Networking Party
items.desc: Wrap up the day with drinks, music, and new connections.

items.name: Nguyen Quang Truong
items.topic: From Idea to Scale as Entrepreneur
